userwallets: Description: Stores all user wallet details, including encryption keys, backup statuses, associated tokens, and wallet metadata.
(userwallets) _id (ObjectId): Unique identifier for the user wallet document.
(userwallets) userId (ObjectId, required): Reference to the user who owns the wallet. Refers to MODEL_USER.
(userwallets) walletName (String, required): Name assigned to the wallet by the user.
(userwallets) encKey (String, required): Encrypted key for secure wallet operations.
(userwallets) decKey (String, required): Decryption key for accessing wallet funds.
(userwallets) vaultAccountAssetId (String | null, default: null): Optional ID for the associated vault asset.
(userwallets) isBackup (Number | null, default: null): Indicates if a backup exists (1=yes, 0=no).
(userwallets) isCloudBackup (Number | null, default: null): Flag for cloud backup status.
(userwallets) isManualBackup (Number | null, default: null): Flag for manual backup status.
(userwallets) isAlreadyTaken (Boolean | null): Indicates if the backup has already been taken.
(userwallets) skipDate (Date | null): Date when backup was skipped.
(userwallets) cloudBackupDate (Date | null): Date of last cloud backup.
(userwallets) manualBackupDate (Date | null): Date of last manual backup.
(userwallets) isSelect (Number, default: 0): Selection status for wallet operations.
(userwallets) isDelete (Number, default: 0): Flag indicating if wallet is deleted (1=yes, 0=no).
(userwallets) tokenIds (Array): Array of token IDs associated with this wallet.
(userwallets) createdAt (Date): Timestamp of when the wallet was created.
(userwallets) updatedAt (Date): Timestamp of the last update to the wallet document.
userwalletaddresses: Description: Stores blockchain addresses associated with each user's wallet, including chain and token references.
(userwalletaddresses) _id (ObjectId): Unique identifier for the wallet address document.
(userwalletaddresses) userId (ObjectId, required): Reference to the user who owns the wallet. Refers to MODEL_USER.
(userwalletaddresses) walletId (ObjectId, required): Reference to the user wallet. Refers to MODEL_USER_WALLET.
(userwalletaddresses) chain (String | null): Blockchain network name (like, Ethereum, BSC).
(userwalletaddresses) chainId (ObjectId, required): Reference to the token on the blockchain. Refers to MODEL_TOKEN.
(userwalletaddresses) subscriptionId (String | null, default: null): Optional subscription ID linked to this address.
(userwalletaddresses) address (String | null, default: null): Blockchain address associated with the wallet.
(userwalletaddresses) createdAt (Date): Timestamp of when the wallet address was created.
(userwalletaddresses) updatedAt (Date): Timestamp of the last update to the wallet address document.
Relationships: **NOTE: This relationship is only for the your semantic understanding for correct query generation not part of the MongoDB schema itself.**
